title: Ethereal Beverage Studio – Multi-Pass Post-Processing Compositor
description: The user operates a cinematic post-processing studio where a coffee mug and a translucent teacup sit on a reflective surface. Through a series of interactive controls, the user layers bloom, depth-of-field, chromatic aberration, vignette, color grading, and a custom god-ray effect, adjusting each pass to craft a final composed beauty shot of the two vessels.
prompt:
Create a single HTML file using Three.js r170 with EffectComposer from three/addons. Load coffeeMug.glb and DiffuseTransmissionTeacup.glb using GLTFLoader. Place the coffee mug at (-1.2, 0, 0) and the teacup at (1.2, 0, 0) on a reflective MeshStandardMaterial ground plane (metalness 0.9, roughness 0.1). Use a PerspectiveCamera at (0, 2.5, 5) looking at origin. Add a warm PointLight (color #ffe4b5, intensity 3) above and behind the objects at (0, 4, -2), plus a subtle blue RectAreaLight (color #4488cc, intensity 1.5) from the right for contrast. Set the scene background to a dark gradient using a simple canvas texture. Build an EffectComposer with these passes in order: RenderPass, UnrealBloomPass (initial strength 0, radius 0.4, threshold 0.85), BokehPass for depth-of-field (focus on mug distance, initial aperture 0.002, maxblur 0.005), and three ShaderPasses: one for chromatic aberration (offset uniform 0.0), one for vignette (darkness uniform 0.0), and one for color grading with a liftGammaGain uniform (vec3, default 0,1,0). Create a dat.GUI panel with these controls the user must adjust: (1) Bloom Strength slider 0-3, (2) Bloom Threshold slider 0-1.5, (3) DoF Focus Distance slider 1-8, (4) DoF Aperture slider 0-0.05, (5) Chromatic Aberration Offset slider 0-0.015, (6) Vignette Darkness slider 0-2, (7) Color Lift R/G/B sliders -0.1 to 0.1, (8) a Toggle button that swaps which object the DoF focuses on by recalculating focus distance. Each parameter must update its corresponding pass uniform in real time. Validate that bloom strength is non-negative, aperture stays within range, and chromatic offset does not exceed 0.015. Enable OrbitControls for camera rotation. The render loop should call composer.render(). Ensure the teacup's transmission material is preserved from the GLB so it appears translucent under bloom, creating a glowing ethereal look distinct from the opaque mug.

[State Exposure (required)]
Expose window.__3D_STATE__ updated every animation frame:
window.__3D_STATE__ = {
  bloomStrength: number,         // current strength of the UnrealBloomPass effect (0-3)
  bloomThreshold: number,         // luminance threshold for bloom activation (0-1.5)
  dofFocusDistance: number,         // depth-of-field focus distance in scene units
  dofAperture: number,         // bokeh aperture size controlling blur amount (0.001-0.01)
  chromaticAberrationOffset: number,         // chromatic aberration distortion offset (0-0.01)
  vignetteDarkness: number,         // vignette edge darkness intensity (0-2)
  colorGradingLift: number,         // color grading lift component (-0.5 to 0.5)
  colorGradingGamma: number,         // color grading gamma component (0.5 to 2)
  godRayIntensity: number,         // custom god-ray effect intensity (0-2)
  postProcessEnabled: boolean,         // whether post-processing compositor is active
  totalPassCount: number,         // count of active effect passes in the composer chain
  renderResolution: number,         // current render target resolution multiplier (0.5-2)
}
